text.title: Tech Radar (ThoughtWorks-Style) Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: Team adds 'Explore' quadrant; cross-team comparison breaks.

antipattern.fix: Validator requires replacement path for Hold.

antipattern.symptom: Radar from 14 months ago; teams use it as gospel.
